title: Sean Connable
text:

research_interests: Rhetorical and political criticism; rhetoric, technology and religious practice; rhetoric and identity; social construction of identity; fundamentalism, social identity, and collective practice

publications: Journal Article, Professional Journal (2018). A Tale of Two Paranoids: A Critical Analysis of the Use of the Paranoid Style by Donald Trump and Viktor Orban . Secrecy and Society. Volume, 1. Issue, 2. Pages, 47.
